Document:
# ZERO TOLERANCE RULES You may be banned for any of the below rules with no warning, questioning, or message.
### Minimum Age Requirement
- Players must be at least 16 years of age to play RMC14. Players must be and act at least 16 years old or they will be removed until they are of age, regardless of standing in the community.
### End of Round Grief
End of round is not end of roleplay.
Please stay in character until the lobby screen appears to maintain an immersive environment for everyone.
- End of round grief (EORG) will result in an instant unappealable 3 hour ban. \n[bold]This includes suicides without a valid roleplay reason.[/bold] - Action will be taken on [bold]any[/bold] friendly fire at round end regardless of who started the griefing, as the round may not be entirely over even if the main condition has been reached.\nDo not return friendly fire at round end, open an ahelp, as this makes it explicitly clear who is griefing.
### Sexual content
- NSFW/Suggestive content is not permitted in any capacity. This includes "It's technically not NSFW" euphemisms, connotations and memes. - Absolutely [bold]no sexual content[/bold] or [bold]Erotic Roleplay (ERP)[/bold], including direct or indirect mentions of sexual behavior or actions. The server age minimum is 16, minors may be present. \n\nDo not roleplay romances or similar behaviors for this same reason.
### Slurs, Racism, etc.
- Absolutely no hate speech, slurs, bigotry, racism (both real and fictional towards any playable race), sexism, ableism, or any other form of discrimination. This includes using letter substitutions to disguise offensive language or as a "joke".\n\n[italic](These characters have co-existed for many decades, and should be treated as any regular human. Racism RP is not permitted.)[/italic]
### Information Fairness
These rules are in place to ensure a fair experience for everyone, preventing unfair advantages and ensuring communication remains within the game.
- Don't share in-game information with anyone playing, through any ooc/external means. - Streaming the game in general is allowed, but those in round should not watch the stream or discuss anything pertaining to the current round with the steamer. - Being in a voice chat or using ooc channels with other players is allowed so long as in-game information and communications are not used in it. Teaching controls and answering mechanical questions that could not be taught in character is allowed.
### Ban evasion
- Attempting to evade game bans will result in an automatic appeal-only permanent ban that is only able to be appealed after six months from the most recent attempt.
- Attempting to evade job bans through promotions or similar will result in significantly worse bans.
### Multiple Accounts
- Players knowingly using multiple accounts will have all of their accounts banned. Appeal with the account you intend to use.\nThis is to prevent players from exploiting game systems and will be treated as such. - Players should avoid sharing accounts. Any actions taken on a shared account will be noted for the use of the account, and not per player using it.
### Exploits and External Programs - Don't use exploits of bugs or external programs to gain an advantage, or disrupt the server in any way.
[bold]Exceptions:[/bold]
- Using an external program to calculate coordinate locations is permitted. - Using an external program to read text on the screen for accessibility purposes is permitted. - Using an external program to write text from speech is permitted, but be wary of rule breaks as a result of loose speech.
### Advertising and Spam - Do not advertise, promote or discuss external servers/communities, this includes but is not limited to asking for DMs in relation or anything similar.\nExposure to unmoderated spaces has consistently introduced toxic behavior into our own, harming the healthy culture we work hard to build and maintain. Out-of-character toxicity observed can and should be reported under the context of [textlink="core rule 3." link="RMCKindness"]
